requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (BDS/IEC 62471 Risk Groups) vs China GB/T 20145
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（BDS/IEC 62471 危险组别）与中国 GB/T 20145 对比
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（BDS/IEC 62471 危險組別）與中國 GB/T 20145 對比

summary.en: Bangladesh addresses photobiological safety of lamps and luminaires through the BSTI-adopted IEC 62471 standard (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which classifies products into risk groups from RG0 (exempt, no hazard) through RG1, RG2, to RG3 (high risk) based on weighted blue-light radiance and irradiance. Where the BSTI certification for a lamp or luminaire category references the photobiological-safety clauses of the adopted BDS/IEC standard, the product's risk group must be assessed and documented, with usage restrictions and warnings for RG2 and above. Bangladesh does not impose an EU-style mandatory blue-light-class consumer label as a separate horizontal energy-labelling obligation; the photobiological requirement, where applicable, sits inside the BSTI product certification. Exporters should confirm with BSTI whether IEC 62471 assessment is required for the specific product type.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国通过 BSTI 采用的 IEC 62471 标准（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）处理灯及灯具的光生物安全，依据加权蓝光辐亮度和辐照度将产品分为从 RG0（豁免，无危害）经 RG1、RG2 至 RG3（高危险）的危险组别。当某灯或灯具类别的 BSTI 认证引用所采用 BDS/IEC 标准的光生物安全条款时，须评估并记录产品的危险组别，对 RG2 及以上须附使用限制及警告。孟加拉国并未实行欧盟式作为单独横向能源标签义务的强制蓝光等级消费者标签；光生物要求（如适用）置于 BSTI 产品认证之内。出口商应向 BSTI 确认具体产品类型是否需进行 IEC 62471 评估。
summary.zht: 孟加拉通過 BSTI 採用的 IEC 62471 標準（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）處理燈及燈具的光生物安全，依據加權藍光輻亮度和輻照度將產品分為從 RG0（豁免，無危害）經 RG1、RG2 至 RG3（高危險）的危險組別。當某燈或燈具類別的 BSTI 認證引用所採用 BDS/IEC 標準的光生物安全條款時，須評估並記錄產品的危險組別，對 RG2 及以上須附使用限制及警告。孟加拉並未實行歐盟式作為單獨橫向能源標籤義務的強制藍光等級消費者標籤；光生物要求（如適用）置於 BSTI 產品認證之內。出口商應向 BSTI 確認具體產品類型是否需進行 IEC 62471 評估。

standards_or_laws: BDS/IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (adopted as Bangladesh Standard via BSTI; risk group classification)
BSTI conformity assessment — photobiological-safety clauses applied within lamp/luminaire certification where relevant

summary.en: China's baseline is GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires. The risk-group framework (RG0-RG3) is the same shared IEC 62471 basis used in Bangladesh.
summary.zh: 中国基线为 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制；对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。危险组别框架（RG0-RG3）与孟加拉国所用的 IEC 62471 基础相同。
summary.zht: 中國基線為 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制；對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。危險組別框架（RG0-RG3）與孟加拉所用的 IEC 62471 基礎相同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 62471)

gap.en: Because both Bangladesh (BDS/IEC 62471) and China (GB/T 20145) share the IEC 62471 risk-group basis, the technical classification is harmonized. The gaps for a Chinese exporter are: (1) GB/T 20145 is recommended-only in China and may not have been formally assessed for a CN-market product, whereas BSTI may require a documented risk-group assessment within the lamp/luminaire certification — verify whether photobiological testing is in scope for the specific product; (2) a Chinese GB/T 20145 report is not automatically accepted by BSTI — assessment/documentation must be routed through the BSTI certification process; (3) unlike the EU, Bangladesh does not require a separate consumer blue-light-class label as a horizontal energy-labelling obligation, so the requirement (where applicable) is a technical-file/certification item rather than a packaging label. RG2/RG3 products should still carry appropriate warnings.
gap.zh: 由于孟加拉国（BDS/IEC 62471）与中国（GB/T 20145）共享 IEC 62471 危险组别基础，技术分类已协调。对中国出口商的差距为：（1）GB/T 20145 在中国仅为推荐性标准，对某中国市场产品可能未正式评估，而 BSTI 在灯/灯具认证中可能要求记录危险组别评估——请核实具体产品是否需进行光生物检测；（2）中国 GB/T 20145 报告不被 BSTI 自动接受——评估/文件须通过 BSTI 认证流程办理；（3）与欧盟不同，孟加拉国不要求作为横向能源标签义务的单独消费者蓝光等级标签，因此该要求（如适用）属于技术文件/认证事项而非包装标签。RG2/RG3 产品仍应附适当警告。
gap.zht: 由於孟加拉（BDS/IEC 62471）與中國（GB/T 20145）共享 IEC 62471 危險組別基礎，技術分類已協調。對中國出口商的差距為：（1）GB/T 20145 在中國僅為推薦性標準，對某中國市場產品可能未正式評估，而 BSTI 在燈/燈具認證中可能要求記錄危險組別評估——請核實具體產品是否需進行光生物檢測；（2）中國 GB/T 20145 報告不被 BSTI 自動接受——評估/文件須通過 BSTI 認證流程辦理；（3）與歐盟不同，孟加拉不要求作為橫向能源標籤義務的單獨消費者藍光等級標籤，因此該要求（如適用）屬於技術文件/認證事項而非包裝標籤。RG2/RG3 產品仍應附適當警告。

mandatory_status.target: Handled within BSTI product certification — photobiological risk-group assessment to BDS/IEC 62471 required where the lamp/luminaire category's certification references it; confirm scope with BSTI
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI), Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh addresses photobiological safety through the BSTI-adopted BDS/IEC 62471 risk-group framework within the lamp/luminaire certification, sharing the same IEC 62471 basis as China's recommended GB/T 20145. A Chinese GB/T 20145 report is not automatically accepted — assessment must be routed through BSTI. Bangladesh does not require an EU-style separate consumer blue-light-class label; confirm with BSTI whether IEC 62471 assessment is in scope for the specific product, and document RG2/RG3 warnings where applicable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国通过 BSTI 采用的 BDS/IEC 62471 危险组别框架在灯/灯具认证中处理光生物安全，与中国推荐性的 GB/T 20145 共享同一 IEC 62471 基础。中国 GB/T 20145 报告不被自动接受——评估须通过 BSTI 办理。孟加拉国不要求欧盟式单独消费者蓝光等级标签；请向 BSTI 确认具体产品是否需进行 IEC 62471 评估，并在适用时记录 RG2/RG3 警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉通過 BSTI 採用的 BDS/IEC 62471 危險組別框架在燈/燈具認證中處理光生物安全，與中國推薦性的 GB/T 20145 共享同一 IEC 62471 基礎。中國 GB/T 20145 報告不被自動接受——評估須通過 BSTI 辦理。孟加拉不要求歐盟式單獨消費者藍光等級標籤；請向 BSTI 確認具體產品是否需進行 IEC 62471 評估，並在適用時記錄 RG2/RG3 警告。

requirement_topic.en: Flicker / Photometric Performance and No Mandatory Blue-Light Consumer Label
requirement_topic.zh: 频闪 / 光度性能及无强制蓝光消费者标签
requirement_topic.zht: 頻閃 / 光度性能及無強制藍光消費者標籤

summary.en: Beyond the IEC 62471 risk-group assessment, photometric and visual-quality characteristics of LED lamps in Bangladesh (luminous flux, colour rendering, correlated colour temperature, and where relevant temporal light artefacts such as flicker) are evaluated against the BSTI-adopted BDS/IEC performance standards (e.g., BDS/IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps) as part of the product's performance certification. Importantly, Bangladesh does NOT impose an EU-style mandatory blue-light-hazard consumer label on packaging (the EU label under Delegated Reg 2019/2015 has no Bangladesh counterpart). Photobiological and photometric requirements, where they apply, are part of the BSTI conformity assessment and technical documentation rather than a separate horizontal consumer-labelling regulation. Exporters should confirm with BSTI which photometric/flicker parameters are tested for the specific product category.
summary.zh: 除 IEC 62471 危险组别评估外，孟加拉国对 LED 灯的光度及视觉质量特性（光通量、显色性、相关色温，以及相关时的频闪等时域光伪影）依据 BSTI 采用的 BDS/IEC 性能标准（如自镇流 LED 灯的 BDS/IEC 62612）作为产品性能认证的一部分进行评估。重要的是，孟加拉国并不在包装上强制要求欧盟式蓝光危害消费者标签（欧盟授权法规 2019/2015 下的标签在孟加拉国无对应）。光生物及光度要求（如适用）属于 BSTI 合格评定及技术文件的一部分，而非单独的横向消费者标签法规。出口商应向 BSTI 确认具体产品类别检测哪些光度/频闪参数。
summary.zht: 除 IEC 62471 危險組別評估外，孟加拉對 LED 燈的光度及視覺質量特性（光通量、顯色性、相關色溫，以及相關時的頻閃等時域光偽影）依據 BSTI 採用的 BDS/IEC 性能標準（如自鎮流 LED 燈的 BDS/IEC 62612）作為產品性能認證的一部分進行評估。重要的是，孟加拉並不在包裝上強制要求歐盟式藍光危害消費者標籤（歐盟授權法規 2019/2015 下的標籤在孟加拉無對應）。光生物及光度要求（如適用）屬於 BSTI 合格評定及技術文件的一部分，而非單獨的橫向消費者標籤法規。出口商應向 BSTI 確認具體產品類別檢測哪些光度/頻閃參數。

standards_or_laws: BDS/IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (adopted as Bangladesh Standard)
BSTI conformity assessment — photometric performance evaluated within product certification; no separate EU-style blue-light consumer label

summary.en: China's baseline performance/energy framework is GB 30255-2019 (energy efficiency for LED room luminaires) with the China Energy Label showing Grade 1-3 by lm/W; photometric parameters are addressed through associated GB/GB-T performance standards. China's CEL focuses on energy-efficiency grade and lumen output and likewise does not carry a blue-light-hazard consumer class on the label, so neither China nor Bangladesh mandates the EU's blue-light label.
summary.zh: 中国基线性能/能效框架为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效），中国能效标识按 lm/W 显示 1-3 级；光度参数通过相关 GB/GB-T 性能标准处理。中国 CEL 侧重能效等级及光通量输出，标签同样不带蓝光危害消费者等级，因此中国与孟加拉国均不强制要求欧盟式蓝光标签。
summary.zht: 中國基線性能/能效框架為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效），中國能效標識按 lm/W 顯示 1-3 級；光度參數通過相關 GB/GB-T 性能標準處理。中國 CEL 側重能效等級及光通量輸出，標籤同樣不帶藍光危害消費者等級，因此中國與孟加拉均不強制要求歐盟式藍光標籤。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) — no blue light hazard consumer class

gap.en: For photometric/flicker performance, both markets rely on IEC-aligned performance standards (Bangladesh BDS/IEC 62612; China GB and related GB/T), so the technical basis is broadly comparable, but Chinese GB/CEL test evidence is not automatically accepted by BSTI and must be routed through the BSTI certification process against the adopted BDS/IEC standard. On the labelling side, neither Bangladesh nor China mandates an EU-style blue-light consumer label, so a Chinese exporter accustomed to the GB regime does not need to add a blue-light consumer class for Bangladesh — this is a point where Bangladesh is closer to China than to the EU. The exporter's practical task is to confirm the BSTI-tested photometric parameters (flux, CCT, CRI, and any flicker limits) for the product category and ensure performance evidence is produced to the applicable BDS/IEC standard.
gap.zh: 对于光度/频闪性能，两个市场均依赖与 IEC 对齐的性能标准（孟加拉国 BDS/IEC 62612；中国 GB 及相关 GB/T），因此技术基础大致可比，但中国 GB/CEL 检测证据不被 BSTI 自动接受，须依据所采用的 BDS/IEC 标准通过 BSTI 认证流程办理。在标签方面，孟加拉国与中国均不强制要求欧盟式蓝光消费者标签，因此习惯于 GB 制度的中国出口商无需为孟加拉国添加蓝光消费者等级——在这一点上孟加拉国更接近中国而非欧盟。出口商的实际任务是确认该产品类别 BSTI 检测的光度参数（光通量、色温、显色指数及任何频闪限值），并确保依据适用的 BDS/IEC 标准出具性能证据。
gap.zht: 對於光度/頻閃性能，兩個市場均依賴與 IEC 對齊的性能標準（孟加拉 BDS/IEC 62612；中國 GB 及相關 GB/T），因此技術基礎大致可比，但中國 GB/CEL 檢測證據不被 BSTI 自動接受，須依據所採用的 BDS/IEC 標準通過 BSTI 認證流程辦理。在標籤方面，孟加拉與中國均不強制要求歐盟式藍光消費者標籤，因此習慣於 GB 制度的中國出口商無需為孟加拉添加藍光消費者等級——在這一點上孟加拉更接近中國而非歐盟。出口商的實際任務是確認該產品類別 BSTI 檢測的光度參數（光通量、色溫、顯色指數及任何頻閃限值），並確保依據適用的 BDS/IEC 標準出具性能證據。

mandatory_status.target: Photometric performance handled within BSTI certification to BDS/IEC; NO mandatory EU-style blue-light consumer label in Bangladesh
mandatory_status.cn: Photometric performance under GB/GB-T; China Energy Label mandatory for energy grade but carries NO blue-light consumer class

source.publisher: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI), Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photometric/flicker performance for LED lamps in Bangladesh is assessed within the BSTI certification against BDS/IEC performance standards (e.g., BDS/IEC 62612); Chinese GB/CEL evidence is not automatically accepted. Notably, Bangladesh — like China — imposes NO EU-style mandatory blue-light-hazard consumer label, so no separate blue-light packaging class is required. Confirm the BSTI-tested photometric parameters for the product category before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国对 LED 灯的光度/频闪性能在 BSTI 认证中依据 BDS/IEC 性能标准（如 BDS/IEC 62612）评估；中国 GB/CEL 证据不被自动接受。值得注意的是，孟加拉国与中国一样均不强制要求欧盟式蓝光危害消费者标签，因此无需单独的蓝光包装等级。出货前请确认该产品类别 BSTI 检测的光度参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉對 LED 燈的光度/頻閃性能在 BSTI 認證中依據 BDS/IEC 性能標準（如 BDS/IEC 62612）評估；中國 GB/CEL 證據不被自動接受。值得注意的是，孟加拉與中國一樣均不強制要求歐盟式藍光危害消費者標籤，因此無需單獨的藍光包裝等級。出貨前請確認該產品類別 BSTI 檢測的光度參數。
